stage1.prompt: 选出 hero 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 英雄（复数 heroes，加 -es 不是 -s）。heroine 女英雄。
learn.example: Firefighters are true heroes.

stage1.prompt: 选出 in the field of 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 在……领域（field 这里指'领域'不是'田野'）。in the field of science 在科学领域。
learn.example: He is an expert in the field of medicine.

stage1.prompt: 选出 contribution 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 贡献。make a contribution to... 对……做出贡献。动词 contribute。
learn.example: She made a great contribution to science.

stage1.prompt: 选出 pioneer 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 先锋；先驱（a pioneer in the field of... 在……领域的先驱）。
learn.example: She was a pioneer in the field of engineering.

stage1.prompt: 选出 education 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 教育（不可数）。higher education 高等教育。动词 educate。
learn.example: Education is the key to success.

stage1.q: 作为工程学领域的先驱，她为科技发展做出了巨大贡献。
options: As a pioneer in the field of engineering, she made great contribution to the development of technology.
As a pioneer in the field of engineering, she made great contributions to the development of technology.
As pioneer in the field of engineering, she made great contributions to the development of technology.
As a pioneer in the field of engineering, she made great contributions for the development of technology.

learn.meaning: gram. ①a pioneer 需要冠词 ②contributions 复数 ③make contributions to（介词 to，不是 for）。
learn.example: She made great contributions to technology.

stage1.prompt: 选出 role model 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 楷模；行为榜样（role 角色 + model 模范）。a role model for young people 年轻人的榜样。
learn.example: She is a role model for many students.

stage1.prompt: 选出 technology 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 科技（不可数）。modern technology 现代科技。形容词 technological。
learn.example: Technology is changing our lives.

stage1.prompt: 选出 hero 的正确复数
stage1.q: Many ___ have made great ___ to society.

learn.meaning: gram. 以 -o 结尾的有生命名词加 -es：hero → heroes。contribution 可数，复数 contributions。
learn.example: Many heroes have made great contributions.

stage1.prompt: 选出 engineering 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 工程学（engineer 工程师 + ing）。in the field of engineering 在工程领域。
learn.example: She studied engineering at university.

stage1.prompt: 选出 devote oneself to 的准确用法

learn.meaning: phr. 献身于；致力于。to 是介词，后接 V-ing（不是动词原形）！devote oneself to doing。
learn.example: He devoted himself to teaching. (NOT: to teach)

options: Heroes are those who devote themself to making our society better.
Heroes are those who devote themselves to make our society better.
Heros are those who devote themselves to making our society better.
Heroes are those who devote themselves to making our society better.

learn.meaning: gram. ①heroes 复数 ②devote to + V-ing ③themselves（反身代词，与 those 一致）。
learn.example: Heroes devote themselves to helping others.

stage2.prompt: 选出 well-respected 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 受尊敬的（well + respected）。well-known 著名的，well-educated 受过良好教育的。
learn.example: She is a well-respected scientist in her field.

stage2.prompt: 选出 spend 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 花（时间）；度过。spend time (in) doing sth 花时间做某事。spend money on sth 花钱买某物。
learn.example: She spent years doing research.

stage2.prompt: 选出 eager 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 热切的；渴望的。be eager to do 渴望做某事。be eager for sth 渴望某物。
learn.example: She is eager to learn new technology.

stage2.prompt: 选出 found 和 find 的区别
stage2.q: The hero ___ the lost child and later ___ a charity for children.

learn.meaning: gram. find 过去式 found（找到）。found 表'建立'的过去式是 founded。第一空是'找到'→ found，第二空是'建立'→ founded。
learn.example: He found the child and founded a charity.

stage2.prompt: 选出 achieve 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v.（凭长期努力）达到（某目标、地位、标准）。achieve one's dream/goal 实现梦想/目标。名词 achievement 成就。
learn.example: She achieved her goal of becoming a scientist.

stage2.q: 这位受人尊敬的科学家花了几十年研究，最终获得了国际奖项。
options: The well-respected scientist spent decades doing research and finally received an international award.
The well-respected scientist spent decades to do research and finally received an international award.
The well-respected scientist spent decades doing research and finally accepted an international award.
The well-respected scientist spent decades doing researches and finally received an international award.

learn.word: spend doing / receive / research 不可数
learn.meaning: gram. ①spend + V-ing（不是 to do）②receive 收到（不是 accept 接受）③research 不可数（不加 s）。
learn.example: She spent decades researching and received an award.

stage2.prompt: 选出 award 作名词的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 奖（win/receive an award 获奖）。也可作动词'授予'：award sb sth。注意 award 和 reward 区别：award 偏'奖项'，reward 偏'回报/酬劳'。
learn.example: He received an award for his contribution.

stage2.prompt: 选出 receive 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 拿到；接到；收到。receive an award 获得奖项。注意：receive 偏'收到'，accept 偏'接受'。
learn.example: She received a medal for her bravery.

stage2.prompt: 选出 award 作动词的正确用法
stage2.q: They ___ her a medal for her courage.

learn.meaning: gram. award sb sth 授予某人某物（双宾语）。reward sb with sth 用某物酬谢某人。两者搭配不同。
learn.example: They awarded her a prize. / They rewarded her with money.

stage2.prompt: 选出 research 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 研究；调查（不可数）。do research on... 做关于……的研究。注意发音：search 在 research 中也读 /sɜːtʃ/。
learn.example: She is doing research on new energy.

stage2.prompt: 选出 found 作动词的准确含义

learn.meaning: v. 建立（城镇或国家）。注意：found 同时也是 find 的过去式/过去分词！两个意思完全不同，看语境判断。
learn.example: He founded the company in 1990. / I found my keys.

stage2.prompt: 选出 spend 的正确句型
stage2.q: He ___ five years ___ on this project.

learn.meaning: gram. spend time + (in) + V-ing（in 可省，但动词必须用 -ing）。不说 spend time to do。
learn.example: He spent years working on it. (NOT: to work)

stage3.prompt: 选出 public 作名词的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 百姓；民众（the public 公众）。也可作形容词'公共的'。the general public 普通民众。
learn.example: The hero won the public's praise.

stage3.q: 这个奖项是对她为社会所做贡献的认可，她赢得了民众的高度赞扬。
options: This award is in recognition of her contributions for society, and she won high praise from the public.
This award is in recognition of her contributions to society, and she won high praises from the public.
This award is in recognition of her contribution to society, and she won high praise from the public.
This award is in recognition of her contributions to society, and she won high praise from the public.

learn.meaning: gram. ①contribution to（介词 to，不是 for）②praise 不可数（不加 s）③contributions 可用复数。
learn.example: She made contributions to society and won high praise.

stage3.prompt: 选出 honour 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 荣誉；名誉（美式拼写 honor）。in honour of 为纪念……。形容词 honourable 光荣的。
learn.example: It's a great honour to receive this award.

stage3.q: 先锋们以提高教育水平为使命，这赢得了全社会的赞同。
options: The pioneers made it their mission to raise the level of education, which won the approval of whole society.
The pioneers made it their mission to rise the level of education, which won the approval of the whole society.
The pioneers made it their mission raising the level of education, which won the approval of the whole society.
The pioneers made it their mission to raise the level of education, which won the approval of the whole society.

learn.word: raise / mission to do / the whole society
learn.meaning: gram. ①raise + 宾语（提高，不是 rise）②mission to do（不定式作后置定语）③the whole society（需要 the）。
learn.example: Their mission was to raise the level of education.

stage3.prompt: 选出 raise 和 rise 的区别
stage3.q: The hero ___ money to help the poor. The sun ___ in the east.

learn.word: raise + 宾语 / rise 不及物
learn.meaning: gram. raise 及物动词+宾语（raised money）。rise 不及物动词，无宾语（the sun rises）。
learn.example: She raised her hand. / The sun rises every day.

stage3.prompt: 选出 praise 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n./v. 赞扬；称赞；赞美。give praise to sb 表扬某人。praise sb for sth 因某事表扬某人。
learn.example: He received high praise for his work.

stage3.prompt: 选出 raise 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 增加；提高（raise awareness 提高意识）。也可指'养育、筹集'。注意 raise 和 rise 区别：raise + 宾语，rise 不及物。
learn.example: They want to raise money for education.

stage3.prompt: 选出 approval 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 赞成；同意（不可数）。动词 approve。approve of... 赞成……。
learn.example: The plan won the approval of the public.

stage3.prompt: 选出 society 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 社会（make contributions to society 为社会做贡献）。可数/不可数。
learn.example: Heroes play an important role in society.

stage3.prompt: 选出 mission 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 使命（a mission to do sth 做某事的使命）。和 task 区别：mission 更高远，task 更日常。
learn.example: Their mission is to protect the forest.

stage3.prompt: 选出 praise 的正确介词搭配
stage3.q: The public praised the firefighter ___ his bravery.

learn.meaning: phr. praise sb for + 名词/V-ing（因某事表扬某人）。不说 praise sb of/to。
learn.example: She praised him for his hard work. (NOT: praised of)

stage3.prompt: 选出 approval 和 approve 的关系
stage3.q: Her parents don't ___ of her plan, but she hopes to win their ___.

learn.meaning: gram. 第一空需要动词 approve（don't + 原形），第二空需要名词 approval（their 后接名词）。
learn.example: They don't approve, but she wants their approval.

stage4.prompt: 选出 female 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 女的；女性的（female scientist 女科学家）。也可作名词'女性'。反义 male。
learn.example: She was a female pioneer in engineering.

stage4.prompt: 选出 look up to 和 admire 的互换
stage4.q: I really ___ my father. He's the person I ___ most.
options: look up to / look up to

learn.meaning: phr. look up to 和 admire 意思相近，可以互换。但 look up to 更口语化。
learn.example: I look up to him. = I admire him.

stage4.prompt: 选出 admire 的正确介词搭配
stage4.q: We all ___ the firefighter ___ his bravery.

learn.meaning: phr. admire sb for + 名词/V-ing（因某事钦佩某人）。和 praise sb for 是同样的搭配模式。
learn.example: I admire her for her hard work. / He praised her for her courage.

stage4.prompt: 选出 regular 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 通常的；平常的（regular exercise 平常的锻炼）。也可指'规则的、定期的'。
learn.example: He is not a hero — he's just a regular person.

stage4.q: 作为一名普通的女性科学家，她激励了许多女孩仰望她并追求科学事业。
options: As a regular woman scientist, she inspired many girls to look up to her and pursue a career in science.
As a regular female scientist, she inspired many girls looking up to her and pursuing a career in science.
As a regular female scientist, she inspired many girls to look up to her and pursue a career in science.
As a regular female scientist, she inspired many girls to look up her and pursue a career in science.

learn.word: inspire sb to do / look up to
learn.meaning: gram. ①inspire sb to do（不是 doing）②look up to（to 不可省，不是 look up）③female 比 woman 更正式。
learn.example: She inspired girls to look up to her.

stage4.prompt: 选出 admire 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 钦佩；仰慕。admire sb for sth 因某事钦佩某人。名词 admiration。
learn.example: I admire her for her courage.

stage4.prompt: 选出 inspire 和 encourage 的区别
stage4.q: Her speech ___ everyone to take action.

learn.meaning: inspire 激励（让人心中燃起热情），encourage 鼓励（让人有信心）。inspire to do 燃起行动热情。
learn.example: She inspired us to dream big. / She encouraged us to try again.

stage4.prompt: 选出 inspire 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 激励；鼓舞。inspire sb to do sth 激励某人做某事。名词 inspiration。
learn.example: Her story inspired many people to study hard.

stage4.prompt: 选出 chief engineer 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 总工程师（chief 首席的 + engineer 工程师）。chief 放在名词前表示'首席/总'。
learn.example: She became the chief engineer of the project.

stage4.prompt: 选出 college entrance examination 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 大学入学考试（college 大学 + entrance 入口/入学 + examination 考试）。= gaokao。
learn.example: She did well in the college entrance examination.

stage4.prompt: 选出 feed 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 养活；提供食物（feed-fed-fed）。feed the family 养家。feed on 以……为食。
learn.example: She works hard to feed her family.

stage4.prompt: 选出 look up to 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 敬仰；钦佩（= admire）。look up to sb 把某人当榜样。注意：look down on 是'看不起'。
learn.example: Many students look up to their teachers.

stage5.prompt: 选出 fit 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 健壮的；健康的。keep fit 保持健康。fit 偏'通过锻炼保持体能好'，healthy 偏'不生病'。
learn.example: Smoke jumpers must be fit and brave.

stage5.prompt: 选出 tough 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 健壮的；坚韧不拔的（指人身体素质和精神都强）。也可指'困难的'。
learn.example: Smoke jumpers need to be tough — both in body and mind.

stage5.prompt: 选出 be proud of 的正确搭配
stage5.q: The public ___ the brave smoke jumpers.

learn.meaning: phr. be proud of sb/sth 为……自豪（介词 of 不是 for/to）。the public 通常用单数 is。
learn.example: We are proud of you. / The public is proud of them.

stage5.prompt: 选出 smoke jumper 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 空降消防员（smoke 烟雾 + jumper 跳跃者 → 空降到火灾现场的消防员）。
learn.example: Smoke jumpers are brave firefighters.

stage5.prompt: 选出 survive 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 生存；存活（survive + 灾难/事故 = 在……中幸存）。名词 survival，survivor 幸存者。
learn.example: Only tough firefighters can survive such conditions.

stage5.prompt: 选出 survive 的正确用法
stage5.q: Only the ___ firefighters ___ the terrible fire.

learn.meaning: gram. survive + 灾难（直接宾语，不用 from）。最 tough 的消防员 → the toughest。
learn.example: They survived the fire. (NOT: survived from the fire)

stage5.q: 空降消防员必须既勇敢又健康，否则他们无法在茂密森林中生存。
options: Smoke jumpers must be both brave and fit, otherwise they cannot survive in the thick forest.
Smoke jumpers must be both brave and fit, or else they cannot survive in the thick forest.
Smoke jumpers must both be brave and fit, otherwise they cannot survive the thick forest.
Both A and B are correct.

learn.meaning: gram. otherwise = or else 否则，两者都可。D 错在 both 位置不当（must be both brave and fit）。
learn.example: Be brave, otherwise/or else you can't survive.

stage5.prompt: 选出 brave 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 勇敢的；无畏的。名词 bravery。Firefighters are brave. = Firefighters show great bravery.
learn.example: The brave smoke jumper saved many lives.

stage5.prompt: 选出 proud 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 骄傲的；自豪的。be proud of... 为……而自豪。名词 pride。
learn.example: We are proud of our heroes.

stage5.prompt: 选出 otherwise 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adv. 否则；不然（= or else）。They must be brave, otherwise they can't survive.
learn.example: Hurry up, otherwise we'll be late.

stage5.prompt: 选出 put out 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 熄灭；扑灭（put out a fire 灭火）。注意 put out 和 put off 区别：put off 推迟。
learn.example: The firemen put out the forest fire quickly.

stage5.prompt: 选出 thick 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 茂密的（thick forest 茂密的森林）。也可指'厚的、浓的'。反义 thin。
learn.example: Smoke jumpers parachute into thick forests.
